description: Create a SWOT analysis diagram in EdrawMax for a 'Cloud Database Migration' project. The diagram must be titled 'Cloud Database Migration SWOT Analysis' and feature a 2x2 matrix with quadrants for STRENGTHS, WEAKNESSES, OPPORTUNITIES, and THREATS, using different background colors for each. Include the following content in the respective quadrants: STRENGTHS (70% cost reduction, Improved scalability, Open-source community, AWS integration); WEAKNESSES (Lack of PostgreSQL expertise, 18-month timeline, Data loss risk, Limited vendor support); OPPORTUNITIES (Leverage AWS Aurora, Modernize stored procedures, Multi-region deployment, Reduce vendor lock-in); and THREATS (Compliance gaps, App compatibility issues, Competitor advantage, Staff attrition). Save the editable diagram to /home/ga/Documents/swot_cloud_migration.eddx and export it as a PDF to /home/ga/Documents/swot_cloud_migration.pdf.
